# GroeimetAI — AI Implementation Partner

> GroeimetAI is an AI implementation partner based in the Netherlands. We build practical AI solutions for businesses of all sizes: chatbots, voice assistants, automations, system integrations, and AI strategy. Fixed prices, real results.

## About

- Company: GroeimetAI (Groei met AI)
- Founded: 2023
- Location: Apeldoorn, Netherlands
- Languages: Dutch, English
- Website: https://groeimetai.io
- Contact: https://groeimetai.io/contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/GroeimetAI

## What We Do

GroeimetAI helps businesses implement AI solutions that save time and create value. We are not a consultancy that only advises — we build, deploy, and maintain production AI systems.

### Services

- **AI Strategy & Consultancy**: Use case discovery, implementation roadmaps, ROI analysis. Helping leaders understand where AI delivers the most value.
- **AI Integrations**: Connecting existing systems and tools with AI automation. MCP protocol, API integrations, smart workflows.
- **Voice AI Development**: Intelligent voice agents for inbound calls, lead qualification, appointment scheduling, and 24/7 customer support.
- **Full-stack Web Development**: Modern websites and web applications built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript.
- **AI Training & Workshops**: Getting teams AI-ready with hands-on training, from fundamentals to advanced agent development.

### Industries We Serve

We work across all industries. Our clients include freelancers, SMEs, and enterprises in healthcare, professional services, retail, manufacturing, real estate, and more. AI is not just for big tech — we make it accessible for every business.

## Our Approach

1. **Free Conversation** — Discover opportunities, no obligations
2. **Expert Assessment** — Deep analysis with concrete proposal, fixed price
3. **Implementation** — Build, test, deploy. Fixed price, guaranteed results

### Key Differentiators

- Fixed prices, no hourly rates
- First conversation always free
- Results within 2-4 weeks
- We handle everything from strategy to production
- No vendor lock-in
- Dutch-based, GDPR-compliant

## Target Audience

- **SMEs & Startups** looking to automate processes and integrate AI
- **Enterprise teams** needing custom AI solutions and integrations
- **Freelancers & Consultants** wanting AI-powered tools for their business
- **IT Leaders & CTOs** evaluating AI strategy and implementation partners

## Results & Impact

- 50-80% time savings on repetitive tasks through AI automation
- 24/7 availability with voice AI and chatbot solutions
- Seamless integration with existing tools and workflows
- Measurable ROI from day one

## Technologies

- Large Language Models (OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini)
- Voice AI (AssemblyAI, ElevenLabs, custom telephony)
- MCP Protocol for system integrations
- RAG Architecture for knowledge systems
- Next.js, React, TypeScript, Python
- Firebase, Google Cloud Platform

## Open Source

- Snow-Flow: ServiceNow AI orchestration framework — https://github.com/GroeimetAI/snow-flow
